title: desmodium hirtum var. delicatulum
intro: Desmodium hirtum var. delicatulum, also known as delicate tick clover, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits associated with delicate tick clover include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Delicate tick clover is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infused in hot water, or made into a poultice to apply directly to the affected area.
